tasks.subject: Task 1: Extend the experiments registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `experiments.ts` carry grouping/tags/source metadata and expose pure helpers, with renamed titles.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments.ts`
- Test: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments.spec.ts` (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Experiment has group/tags/sourcePath; titles renamed to Simple Form & Wizard Form under Signal Forms
- groupExperiments groups by group preserving order
- sourceUrl returns REPO_URL/tree/main/sourcePath
- tagVariant maps known tags with neutral fallback
- slugs unchanged

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-host` -> experiments suite passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Experiment has group/tags/sourcePath; titles renamed under Signal Forms", "groupExperiments groups by group preserving order", "sourceUrl returns REPO_URL/tree/main/sourcePath", "tagVariant maps known tags with neutral fallback", "slugs unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Theming — tokens, ThemeService, no-FOUC bootstrap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A data-theme-driven design-token system with a tiny service and a flash-free initial paint; brand title set.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/tommy/host/src/styles.css`
- Modify: `apps/tommy/host/src/index.html`
- Create: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/theme.service.ts`
- Test: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/theme.service.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- light tokens on :root, dark on :root[data-theme=dark], body+reduced-motion guard
- ThemeService inits from storage/media defaulting light; toggle writes data-theme+persists; guarded access (no empty catch)
- index.html title + theme-color meta + no-FOUC inline script

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-host` -> ThemeService suite passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/host/src/styles.css", "apps/tommy/host/src/index.html", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/theme.service.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/theme.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["light tokens :root, dark :root[data-theme=dark], body+reduced-motion", "ThemeService inits storage/media default light; toggle writes data-theme+persists; guarded", "index.html title + theme-color + no-FOUC script"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: GitHub icon component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A reusable inline-SVG GitHub mark used by the action bar, sidebar, and source links (icon, not the word).

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/github-icon.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- tommy-github-icon renders inline currentColor SVG, aria-hidden, host-sized
- standalone OnPush no inputs

**Verify:** `pnpm nx build tommy-host` compiles it.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/github-icon.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tommy-github-icon inline currentColor SVG aria-hidden host-sized", "standalone OnPush no inputs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: SideNav component (grouped, collapsible)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Brand + collapsible category groups of experiment links + a GitHub source link, emitting navigate so the mobile drawer can close.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/side-nav.ts`
- Test: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/side-nav.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .group-heading per group and .nav-link per experiment from groupExperiments()
- groups collapsible default-open; collapse hides links
- brand/link click emits navigate
- GitHub repo link via tommy-github-icon + REPO_URL

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-host` -> SideNav suite passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/side-nav.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/side-nav.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": [".group-heading per group and .nav-link per experiment", "groups collapsible default-open; collapse hides links", "brand/link click emits navigate", "GitHub repo link via tommy-github-icon + REPO_URL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Command palette (⌘K)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A registry-driven overlay that filters experiments, supports keyboard navigation, and routes on selection.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/command-palette.ts`
- Test: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/command-palette.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- openPalette/close/toggle/open state
- filter by title/group/tag (case-insensitive); empty query shows all
- Arrow keys move active clamped; Enter routes to active+closes; Escape closes
- selection calls Router.navigate([slug])

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-host` -> CommandPalette suite passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/command-palette.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/command-palette.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["openPalette/close/toggle/open state", "filter by title/group/tag; empty shows all", "Arrow keys move active clamped; Enter routes+closes; Escape closes", "selection calls Router.navigate([slug])"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: App shell — ActionBar + layout, drawer, ⌘K, light surface
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Assemble the shell: sticky action bar (search/theme/GitHub/hamburger), responsive grid with mobile drawer, global ⌘K handler, forced-light surface for experiment routes.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/action-bar.ts`
- Modify: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/app.ts`, `app.html`, `app.css`, `app.routes.ts`, `app.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ActionBar: ⌘K search trigger, theme toggle wired to ThemeService, GitHub icon link, hamburger (mobile only); emits openSearch/toggleDrawer
- App CSS-grid layout; <768px off-canvas drawer + backdrop, toggled by hamburger, closed on nav
- Ctrl/Cmd+K toggles palette globally (preventDefault)
- experiment routes render in .surface-host light tokens; landing does not
- route titles end with Tommy's Angular Lab; app.spec passes

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-host && pnpm nx build tommy-host` both green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/host/src/app/shell/action-bar.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/app.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/app.html", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/app.css", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/app.routes.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/app.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-host && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ActionBar search/theme/GitHub/hamburger emits openSearch+toggleDrawer", "CSS-grid shell; <768px drawer+backdrop closing on nav", "Cmd/Ctrl+K toggles palette with preventDefault", "experiment routes in .surface-host light tokens; landing not", "route titles end Tommy's Angular Lab; app.spec passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Landing page — grouped sections, badges, source links
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rebuild the home page into grouped sections of cards carrying tech badges and a GitHub view-source link, themed via tokens.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/home/home.ts`, `home.html`, `home.css`
- Test: `apps/tommy/host/src/app/home/home.spec.ts` (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .group-title per group and .card per experiment
- tags as .badge[data-variant] chips; .source GitHub link href=sourceUrl(exp) target _blank rel noopener; Open link
- heading Tommy's Angular Lab; styles use theme tokens

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-host` -> Home suite passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/tommy/host/src/app/home/home.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/home/home.html", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/home/home.css", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/home/home.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": [".group-title per group, .card per experiment", "tags as .badge[data-variant]; .source href=sourceUrl target _blank rel noopener; Open link", "heading Tommy's Angular Lab; token-based styles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Final integration & verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole lab lints, tests, builds, and behaves correctly across themes and breakpoints.

**Files:** none (verification only; commit any fixes the checks surface).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pnpm nx lint tommy-host clean
- pnpm nx test tommy-host all suites green
- pnpm nx build tommy-host green (AOT/strictTemplates)
- manual: responsive 768px sidebar<->drawer; theme toggle persists no flash; experiment on light surface in dark mode; ⌘K open/filter/arrows/enter/esc; GitHub icons -> repo; card Source -> correct libs/tommy folder

**Verify:** `pnpm nx lint tommy-host && pnpm nx test tommy-host && pnpm nx build tommy-host` exits 0, then manual smoke via `pnpm nx serve tommy-host`.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx lint tommy-host && pnpm nx test tommy-host && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lint clean", "all unit suites green", "AOT build green", "manual: responsive, theme persistence no-flash, dark-mode light surface, ⌘K, GitHub + Source links"]}
```
